sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85706" key="popanopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποπᾰνο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n85706.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make cakes,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in R.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.245K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
